refnamediv.refpurpose: Updates a field using an atomic update modifier

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
fieldName
The name of the field to update.
modifier
The update operation to apply, one of the SolrInputDocument::UPDATE_MODIFIER_ADD, SolrInputDocument::UPDATE_MODIFIER_SET, SolrInputDocument::UPDATE_MODIFIER_INC, SolrInputDocument::UPDATE_MODIFIER_REMOVE or SolrInputDocument::UPDATE_MODIFIER_REMOVEREGEX constants.
value
The value used by the update operation.

&reftitle.returnvalues;
Returns &true; on success, or &false; on failure.
